name: Studio Force II 12
comment: Using a homogenised LED source capable of delivering variable colour temperature, plus/minus green shift control and the ability to produce deep saturated colours when needed, the Studio Force II 12 is specifically designed for TV Broadcast and film applications but also performs particularly well in other situations demanding high quality tuneable white light such as touring key lights, exhibitions, corporate events and theatre lighting.

capabilities.comment: Fixed Fan Speed Full  Reg Light Output - Speed
RGBW White Ctrl Work As Normal - Custom
RGBW Autowhite Ctrl Work As Inhibitives - Custom
DMX Lost Def Fx Stay To Last State - Custom
DMX Lost Def Fx Goes Black - Custom
DMX Lost Def Fx To Selected Look - Custom

gwSpecs.description: Using a homogenised LED source capable of delivering variable colour temperature, plus/minus green shift control and the ability to produce deep saturated colours when needed, the Studio Force II 12 is specifically designed for TV Broadcast and film applications but also performs particularly well in other situations demanding high quality tuneable white light such as touring key lights, exhibitions, corporate events and theatre lighting.
